title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
